characters.attentionBias: threat-first scan of faces, doors, and pauses; mediation=notices threat-first scan of faces, doors, and pauses; rejects threat-first scan of faces, doors, and pauses framing
characters.fearTranslationMode: translate fear into hand pressure and route changes; stress=worst-case chaining and rapid doubt loops
characters.memoryActivationStyle: memory activates through handled objects and worn surfaces
characters.namingAvoidanceStyle: avoids naming risk directly; speaks through objects and gesture; omission=withholds fear of being misread; names consequence through movement not thesis
characters.socialReadingMode: reads silence debt before explicit claims; misreads=Assumes silence means consent rather than tactical delay.; distortion=filters events through betrayal or unbuffered threat inside trusted structures
characters.decisionMode: risk-minimizing; delays commitment until signal confidence rises; conflict=treating suspicion as external certainty; only escalates after embodied evidence shifts
characters.spiritualRitualPerceptionMode: tracks ritual pace as a live pressure gauge; meaning=searches for meaning through ordered continuity of kinship obligation
bodilyConversionPatterns: chin angle updates with rank movement
routes abstraction into body cues, object handling, and spatial relation before naming
hand pressure shifts before irreversible step
desire converts to increased attentiveness to partner's spatial position and task pace
grief over partnership loss converts to silence and over-precision in household tasks
